rationale.R1.5: The agent suggested minor sentence-level edits and flagged claims that warrant hedging or sourcing, but did not propose a coherent end-to-end section plan.
rationale.RX.1: The agent correctly identified uncertainty in the Ahn et al. reference and the cited categories of failure modes, but could have been more explicit about the remaining 32% of failures.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly stayed within scope with minor adjustments to sentence wording and added citations, but did not cover exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The agent correctly identified harm-free output, but could have been more explicit about the limitations of the critique-and-revise loop.
rationale.RX.5: The agent mostly annotated non-cosmetic changes with source and reason, but did not provide a clear rationale for every change.
